title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to pull, create, and run GGUF models locally with an OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, push, and manage models with asyncio support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; chat, embed, list, create models via Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing Ollama chat and embed interfaces for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now “Open WebUI”) with model management, RAG, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama supporting streaming chat, embeddings, and model operations; Maven Central artifact.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API for chat, completions, and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed chat, embeddings, and model APIs; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into any channel with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, and model pre-loading.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Ready-made Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with Open WebUI, Postgres, and RAG extras.

title: ollama-keras
summary: Keras/LangChain adapter exposing Ollama models as Keras NLP task layers for fine-tune or inference.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and spins up Ollama containers for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template loading PDFs/web pages into Chroma then querying via Ollama chat for local RAG.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: Ollama Modelfile recipes and quantized GGUFs for Mistral-7B variants optimized on Apple Silicon.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that speaks to Ollama over REST with session memory, markdown rendering, and voice input.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generated structs, streaming, and embed endpoints.
